title: Wheeling lanes, cycle tracks and bike lanes

extensions.supports_claims: City designs, builds, and operates its own cycling infrastructure (bike lanes, cycle tracks, wheeling lanes) on Calgary roadways; references the City's Traffic Bylaw.
extensions.note: Calgary-specific instance of the city-owns-its-streets claim. Other municipalities' events would add their own city source; the province-wide jurisdiction claim rests on R-mga, not this page.
